ideation: This animation sequence will depict a playful, almost dancing movement, reflecting the energetic nature of poodles. The robot will use both arms to create a sense of movement and joy.  The sequence will be short, capturing three distinct poses. Frame one shows a neutral pose to set the stage. Frame two begins the 'dance' with a distinct arm movement. Frame three finishes the motion.

frames.beat: arms hang loosely, ready for a poodle's prance
arms swing out and up in a joyful, bouncy step
arms cross and dip in a playful, energetic flourish
